ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-17-2006 CONTINUED TO JUN-28-2006 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). MAY-17-2006 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
